sentences.text: But the storm got worse, and the rain fell heavily, so little Hans could not see where he was going or keep up with the horse.
Finally, he lost his way and wandered onto the moor, which was very dangerous because it had deep holes, and there poor little Hans drowned.
Some goatherds found his body the next day floating in a big pool of water and brought it back to the cottage.
Everyone went to little Hans' funeral because he was very popular, and the Miller was the chief mourner.
